modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log into USD websites using CAS authentication

full_description_text:  
So, I was just trying to log into the USD Events Calendar to reserve a room with the scheduler, right? But then, out of nowhere, CAS just wouldn’t let me in! It kept saying my login was incorrect, and I even got this weird error about my session timing out or something. I also tried logging into myUSD and the Housing Application, but it just kept throwing errors like "Application Not Authorized to Use CAS" and "Secure Connection Failed." It’s super frustrating because I really need to get this done!
short_description: Unable to log into USD websites using CAS authentication

It kept saying my login was incorrect, and I even got this weird error about my session timing out or something. I also tried logging into myUSD and the Housing Application, but it just kept throwing errors like "Application Not Authorized to Use CAS" and "Secure Connection Failed." It’s super frustrating because I really need to get this done!
